description: Increase the delay feedback from 0.2 to 0.7.

native_implementations.reaper: Set the 'Feedback' parameter of the JS delay (ReaDelay / a JS feedback-delay) on the Lead Vox track from 0.2 to 0.7. REAPER JS-plugin parameters are host-visible and enumerable, so this change is OBSERVED — the real observable path for a parameter A/B.
native_implementations.note: Cubase VST3 plug-in parameters are opaque (DAWproject stores them as a state blob; dawproject.py:228) — the same feedback change made to a VST3 delay in Cubase would be HIDDEN, not readable from files. This experiment is therefore demonstrated synthetically on the REAPER-style observable path rather than worked around.
